records.m_Talk_ENG: You've come a long way. You must be the nun sent from the Valentinus Monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've come a long way. You must be the nun sent from the Valentinus Monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've come a long way. You must be the nun sent from the Valentinus Monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. My name is Lucia Ridge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. My name is Lucia Ridge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. My name is Lucia Ridge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You look upset. Is something bothering you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You look upset. Is something bothering you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You look upset. Is something bothering you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, shouldn't this guy have covered my travel expenses too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, shouldn't this guy have covered my travel expenses too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, shouldn't this guy have covered my travel expenses too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what is up with this run-down cafe?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what is up with this run-down cafe?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what is up with this run-down cafe?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is exactly how people ghost you after dodging a payment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is exactly how people ghost you after dodging a payment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is exactly how people ghost you after dodging a payment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A noble with a mansion, huh? What if all his assets have already been seized?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A noble with a mansion, huh? What if all his assets have already been seized?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A noble with a mansion, huh? What if all his assets have already been seized?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems my sorrow for not being able to ease your suffering sooner is showing on my face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems my sorrow for not being able to ease your suffering sooner is showing on my face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems my sorrow for not being able to ease your suffering sooner is showing on my face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to confess my sins today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to confess my sins today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to confess my sins today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, it would be wrong not to repent for failing to see your pain earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, it would be wrong not to repent for failing to see your pain earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, it would be wrong not to repent for failing to see your pain earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a bit much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a bit much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a bit much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been staying at my villa, so I wasn't aware of the situation in town.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been staying at my villa, so I wasn't aware of the situation in town.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been staying at my villa, so I wasn't aware of the situation in town.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A villa...? Pardon me, but just how many houses do you own?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A villa...? Pardon me, but just how many houses do you own?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A villa...? Pardon me, but just how many houses do you own?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wouldn't know. My financial manager handles all of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wouldn't know. My financial manager handles all of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wouldn't know. My financial manager handles all of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can ask if you'd like?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can ask if you'd like?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can ask if you'd like?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need. That was exactly the answer I wanted to hear, brother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need. That was exactly the answer I wanted to hear, brother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need. That was exactly the answer I wanted to hear, brother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get to the point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get to the point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get to the point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ancestors have risen from the underground cemetery and are wreaking havoc on my lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ancestors have risen from the underground cemetery and are wreaking havoc on my lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ancestors have risen from the underground cemetery and are wreaking havoc on my lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ancestors rising from the dead... now that's an interesting ghost story.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ancestors rising from the dead... now that's an interesting ghost story.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ancestors rising from the dead... now that's an interesting ghost story.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what my estate caretaker reported.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what my estate caretaker reported.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what my estate caretaker reported.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apparently, every night, strange noises echo from below, and when they go to check, they see the ancestors there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apparently, every night, strange noises echo from below, and when they go to check, they see the ancestors there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apparently, every night, strange noises echo from below, and when they go to check, they see the ancestors there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I figured it was just work-related stress and gave them time off, but something about it still doesn't sit right with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I figured it was just work-related stress and gave them time off, but something about it still doesn't sit right with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I figured it was just work-related stress and gave them time off, but something about it still doesn't sit right with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ha, haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ha, haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ha, haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brother Ludwig, you've come to the right place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brother Ludwig, you've come to the right place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brother Ludwig, you've come to the right place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the Valentinus Monastery, dealing with cases like these is our specialty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the Valentinus Monastery, dealing with cases like these is our specialty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the Valentinus Monastery, dealing with cases like these is our specialty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just to be sure, you didn't hire anyone else for this before coming to us, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just to be sure, you didn't hire anyone else for this before coming to us, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just to be sure, you didn't hire anyone else for this before coming to us, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If some random amateurs tried to handle this, the evil spirits could get angry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If some random amateurs tried to handle this, the evil spirits could get angry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If some random amateurs tried to handle this, the evil spirits could get angry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After some searching, I found out the Valentinus Monastery has the best expertise in matters like these.

records.m_Talk_FRA: After some searching, I found out the Valentinus Monastery has the best expertise in matters like these.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I really hit the jackpot this time.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Calling me in over some half-baked rumors?
